source_excerpt: Our total revenues increased $32.2 billion or 4.7% and $32.9 billion or 5.1% for fiscal 2026 and 2025, respectively, when compared to the previous fiscal year.
notes: The dollar amount ($32.2 billion) matches the source, but the percentage growth rate is materially wrong: the source states 4.7% for fiscal 2026, while the claim asserts 6.7%. This numeric error renders the claim unsupported.
